race.comment: BRIMARVI ROSEMARIE (8) was well supported fresh when just coming up short here a fortnight ago. Is sure to have come on from that and can go one better this time. GAZELLE (6) broke through comfortably for her maiden win over 1200m at Mt Gambier last time, putting 4L to her nearest rival. Drawn sticky but has more to offer and keeps winning hoop. MALDIVICA (7) drove hard late to get off the mark two back at Gawler. Was less effective last start when tackling stronger company but still held her own for a midfield finish. Much better placed back to this level and is one of the main hopes. ARAMOSO (4) took an eternity to finally get off the mark three back at Oakbank. Hasn't quite been able to go on with it yet but is one to keep safe in the placings.
